destinations.evidence: The codec type is exported from the shared precompile-codecs crate.
The decoder extracts executor, secrets, ttl, secret signatures, user key, messages_json, and model from ABI positions used for LLM validation.

equivalence_argument: The port keeps LLM validation fields in a dedicated codec object and re-exports it for validators, matching the required ABI field extraction contract.
rationale: The primary diff adds and re-exports LLMCallRequest, and its decoder is explicitly scoped to the fields needed for RPC-level validation of LLM requests. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: The ritual-precompile-codecs crate must provide an LLMCallRequest decoder that extracts executor, encrypted_secrets, ttl, secret_signature, user_public_key, messages_json, and model from ABI-encoded LLM precompile input for validation.
suggested_falsification_tests: ABI-encode an LLM call with the first seven fields populated and assert LLMCallRequest::from_abi returns those exact executor, ttl, secret_signature, user_public_key, messages_json, and model values; pass malformed or insufficient ABI data and assert DecodeFailed/CodecError.
summary: The LLM validation codec is present and exported.
test_or_falsification_candidate: ABI-encode an LLM request with distinct first-seven validation fields and assert LLMCallRequest::from_abi returns them exactly.
title: LLM call codec exposes validation fields
